body: This PR adds using the Julia depot, and adds buildkite groups. Adding the remaining examples next.
title: Use Julia Depot, add buildkite groups

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `ClimaCoreVTK` package from `0.6` to `0.6, 0.7`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for ClimaCoreVTK to 0.7, (keep existing compat)
